title: telinaria linifolia
intro: Telinaria linifolia, also known as the flax-leaved rush or pukinikini, is a species of flowering plant in the family Restionaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which can help to reduce swelling and fight infections. The health benefits of Telinaria linifolia include its ability to aid in wound healing, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues, making it a valuable herb for treating various ailments. In herbal preparations, the leaves and stems of the plant can be used to make teas, infusions, or decoctions, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
